title: rubus villicaulis f. rectangulatus
intro: Rubus villicaulis f. rectangulatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan wild raspberry, is a variety of the Himalayan raspberry shrub that is native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Rubus villicaulis f. rectangulatus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
